name: Spicy Sausage Phyllo Bundles
recipeIngredient: Frozen phyllo sheets, thawed (12 sheets, 18x14 inches)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large skillet over medium heat, brown the sausage, green bell pepper, and onion; drain excess fat.
3. Add remaining ingredients (ricotta cheese, oregano) to the skillet; stir until combined.
4. Unroll phyllo sheets and cover with plastic wrap or towel. Place one sheet on work surface; brush with margarine.
5. Layer two more sheets, brushing each with margarine. Use a sharp knife to cut through layers into 12 rectangles.
6. Spoon filling into center of each rectangle. Fold corners up and gently press together to seal the bundle.
7. Repeat with remaining phyllo sheets and filling.
8. Place bundles on an ungreased baking sheet.
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
Note: To prepare ahead, assemble as directed, cover tightly, and refrigerate up to 24 hours before baking.
